steps.name: Given user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to "Videos" section of Manage
And user goes to "quiz" page of the video
When user adds "edits" quiz questions and "TEXT" type without additional parameters
Then user verifies "edited" quiz with additional parameters is present in the video "event_analytics"
